title: Measure Ruler (chart.measure)

chart.options: chart: { id: 'price', type: 'area', height: 380, fontFamily: 'Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif', animations: { enabled: false }, measure: { enabled: true, pinOnRelease: true }, toolbar: { show: true, autoSelected: 'measure' }, zoom: { enabled: true, type: 'x' }, }, stroke: { width: 2, curve: 'straight' }, dataLabels: { enabled: false }, title: { text: 'Price (measure any move)', align: 'left' }, xaxis: { type: 'numeric', title: { text: 'Session' } }, yaxis: { title: { text: 'Price' }, decimalsInFloat: 0 },
